prompt: An audit found real bugs in three packages: the OpenAI invoker in @prune/agent-sdk-adapter mishandles some responses, the effective-context-fullness computation in @prune/context-health breaks on edge-case inputs, and @prune/semantic-cache has cache-correctness bugs including in its lexical embedder. Each of the three packages has failing tests specifying the corrected behavior; fix all three.
oracleCmd: (cd packages/agent-sdk-adapter && npx vitest run src/invokers/openai.test.ts) && (cd packages/context-health && npx vitest run src/edge-cases.test.ts) && (cd packages/semantic-cache && npx vitest run src/edge-cases.test.ts)
notes: Reference: audit (4 real bugs) 2026-06-02, restricted to the three packages whose implementation changed. Cross-package navigation is the point of this task.
